title: Fuel Injector Balance and Contribution Test
description: Activates individual fuel injectors via RoutineControl to measure per-cylinder fuel contribution delta, identifying clogged, stuck, or leaking injectors that cause misfire codes without external flow bench testing. Complements misfire DTCs to pinpoint which injector needs service.
common_symptoms: rough idle with specific cylinder contribution drop
P0300 random misfire confirmed to specific cylinder via contribution test
fuel injector noise difference between cylinders
physical_solution: Using scan tool, activate individual injector kill test (disable one injector at a time while monitoring RPM drop or misfire rate). Good injector: RPM drops noticeably when disabled. Bad injector: minimal RPM drop when disabled (already not contributing). Also: activate injector ON via $2F to pulse it and listen for spray pattern on running engine.

uds_services: $27 SecurityAccess — required on some OEMs for $2F
technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — $31 per-cylinder contribution test accessible via ELM on older GM (routine IDs $B004-$B010 per cylinder), pre-2018 Ford. $2F individual injector control requires extended session + security access — limited on gateway vehicles. BMW injector KFUVS adaptation map via $22 at ECM 0x12 accessible pre-ZGW. VW injector quantity adaptation via measuring blocks accessible pre-SFD.

procedure_steps.description: $22 [INJECTOR_ADAPTATION_DID] — read current per-cylinder injector adaptation values. BMW: KFUVS map at DID 0x4942. VW/Audi: injector quantity correction adaptation (Group 015 in older, DID via measuring block). Normal range: +/-2 mg/stroke. Values >+3 mg: injector under-delivering (clogged). Values <-3 mg: injector over-delivering (leaking).
$31 01 [CYLINDER_CONTRIBUTION_ROUTINE] — for GM specifically: routine $B001 initiates contribution test mode. Each cylinder disabled sequentially. ECM reports RPM change per cylinder.

$2F [INJECTOR_CYL1_DID] 03 00 — disable cylinder 1 injector (IO control to 0). Monitor idle RPM and STFT. RPM drop >50 RPM: injector was contributing. RPM drop <20 RPM: injector not contributing (clogged or failed). Restore with $2F [DID] 04 00 (return to ECU control).

Repeat disable test for each cylinder sequentially. Note RPM drop magnitude per cylinder. Consistency check — all cylinders should show similar RPM drop. Identify outlier cylinder with lowest RPM drop.

For identified injector — remove and send for ultrasonic cleaning or replace. On GDI engines: injector removal requires fuel rail pressure relief and return line precautions. GDI injectors have copper washer seals — always replace on reinstall.

After cleaning/replacement, re-run contribution test. All cylinders should show similar RPM drop. Clear misfire DTCs and road test. Re-read injector adaptation map — values should trend toward zero after 2-3 drive cycles.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Injector activation via $31 at ECM 0x700. Routine ID varies by model year. 2GR-FE V6: injector contribution accessible via Techstream but ELM limited. Injector correction values via $22 DID [TOYOTA_INJ_CORR_DID]. Common: GDI carbon deposits causing lean misfire — injector cleaning service at 60k miles.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: $2F injector disable accessible on pre-2018 via ELM. J35 V6: injector contribution via HDS. 1.5T/2.0T GDI: injector quantity correction via enhanced data. Injector carbon walnut blast recommended at 60k miles on GDI. ELM limited for $2F on newer models.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: CONSULT injector contribution test. $31 accessible via ELM on pre-2019. VQ35DE: known injector O-ring failure causing rich/oil-fouled plugs. Cylinders 2 and 5 common failure pattern on VQ35HR. ELM accessible on most years.
oem_notes.Ford: Injector contribution test via PCM $31 pre-2018. 2018+ requires FDRS. 5.0L Coyote: injector adaptation via IDS KOEO injector test. 3.5L EcoBoost: injector carbon buildup on port side common (dual injection). ELM $31 accessible pre-2018.
oem_notes.GM: MOST ACCESSIBLE via ELM — $31 01 B001-B008 per-cylinder test on most Gen III/IV/V engines. Silverado 5.3L: disable AFM before contribution test to avoid false cylinder readings. GDS2 shows graphical contribution chart. ELM $31 accessible on most GM year ranges.
oem_notes.BMW: KFUVS (Kraftstoff Verbrauch pro Umsatz Sequenz) injector adaptation map at DID 0x4942 (varies by DME). Values in mg/stroke. $31 injector test routine at ECM 0x12. ZGW blocks on F/G-series — ISTA required. N54/N55: injector replacement common at 80k miles. Injector coding required after replacement (reference injector_coding.json).
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Injector quantity adaptation at Group 015 (measuring block) or DID via $22. $31 injector activation test at ECM 0x01. SFD blocks on 2019+. HPFP cam follower wear creates injector quantity compensation — check follower if all cylinders showing negative correction. ODIS required for 2019+ tests.
oem_notes.Stellantis: 5.7L HEMI: injector contribution via $31 at PCM. MDS cylinders 2/3/5/8 — disable MDS first for accurate contribution readings. wiTECH 2018+. ELM pre-2018. 3.6L Pentastar: injector adaptation via $22. GDI Hurricane 2.0T: $31 accessible.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Injector contribution via GDS-Mobile $31 at ECM 0x7E0. Theta II 2.4L: injector failure known issue — P0300 random misfire. Lambda 3.3T: injector adaptation via $22 DID. 2019+ gateway blocks $31. Pre-2019 ELM accessible. Injector coding required after replacement on GDI-equipped models.
